payload.last_assistant_message:
Browser screenshots are not available (Chrome not installed). The implementation review can proceed based on code analysis alone.

---

## Executive Summary

The implementation cleanly satisfies the spec. Commit `6affb50` adds exactly two CSS custom property overrides (`--merch-card-collection-header-filter-height: 66px` and `--merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height: 66px`) inside the `merch-card-collection-header.plans` selector block in `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js`. The change is minimal, targeted, and leaves all surrounding layout selectors untouched. `node --check` passes with no syntax errors.

---

## Issues by Severity

No issues found.

---

## Plan Compliance

| Acceptance Criterion | Status |
|---|---|
| `merch-card-collection-header.plans` renders with taller header (~66px vs default 44px) | ✅ Both height variables set to 66px in the correct selector |
| Filter button, sort button, and search input are all taller | ✅ `--merch-card-collection-header-filter-height` and `--merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height` propagate to these elements via base CSS |
| No layout regression below the header | ✅ Only the two height variables added; no other selectors modified |
| `node --check` passes with no syntax errors | ✅ Confirmed |

---

## Verdict: PASS

JS syntax check passes and no layout regressions are introduced.",
